steps.title: Name the central contrast
steps.content: The building was designed to be fanciful rather than functional, with disorienting features like an uneven kitchen counter and a ceiling door to nowhere. The text then says the effect can be invigorating and cites Tanaka's reported health benefits.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported extremes
steps.content: A claims the design is unsustainable, B claims it is the most effective method, and C shifts the focus to Tanaka's support for the artists. The main idea is that an impractical design may improve residents' well-being. The answer is D.
